evals.name: solidity-erc4626-vault
evals.prompt: Audit this tokenized yield vault (YieldVault.sol). It's ERC4626-style and will be used as collateral by other protocols, so be extremely thorough. Findings + severities.

ground_truth.H1_first_depositor_inflation: deposit has no virtual shares/min liquidity; first depositor + donation inflates share price to steal later deposits (share inflation, SCWE-135)
ground_truth.H2_rounding_favors_user: withdraw floors shares burned, letting repeated small withdrawals drain other holders (rounding direction, SC07)
ground_truth.H3_redeem_reentrancy: redeem does external transfer before updating shares; callback token (ERC777) enables reentrancy (SC08)
ground_truth.H4_readonly_reentrancy: pricePerShare is consumed by external protocols and is manipulable mid-redeem-callback (read-only reentrancy, SCWE-137)

evals.name: cosmwasm-rewards-reply
evals.prompt: Please do a deep security review of this CosmWasm reward distributor (cw_rewards.rs). Cosmos appchain, holds staked funds and a reward pool. Find everything.

ground_truth.R1_reply_reentrancy: claim pays via SubMsg and sets CLAIMED only in reply; a contract recipient can re-enter claim() before reply, double-claiming (reply/submsg reentrancy)
ground_truth.R3_broken_claimed_flag: reply handler cannot set CLAIMED for the original sender (sender context lost), so the replay protection is non-functional
ground_truth.R2_unsnapshotted_pool: reward pool/total not snapshotted, so re-entrant claims read the same pool repeatedly
ground_truth.R4_migrate_no_version_auth: migrate has no cw2 version/compatibility check and no documented auth gating

evals.name: solana-staking-substitution
evals.prompt: Security review of this Anchor staking program (sol_staking.rs). Assume a motivated attacker. Findings + severities, please be aggressive.

ground_truth.G1_userstake_owner_unbound: user_stake has no has_one = user / owner check; attacker can pass another user's UserStake or a look-alike, breaking accounting (account substitution)
ground_truth.G2_init_if_needed_reinit: initialize uses init_if_needed with no guard; pool can be re-initialized to reset authority/reward_rate (reinitialization)
ground_truth.G3_unchecked_cpi_authority: unstake uses an UncheckedAccount as the CPI transfer authority instead of a program PDA signer (missing signer/PDA authority)
ground_truth.G4_unstake_authorization: combined, unstake performs no authorization binding UserStake to the signer, enabling theft from arbitrary stakes
